metadata.description: claude code plugins by ani potts: session mesh, knowledge graph over your history, and time awareness.

plugins.name: cc
plugins.description: session mesh for claude code (email-cc semantics): awareness digests, file-overlap alerts, topic subscriptions, cross-session messaging.

plugins.name: lore
plugins.description: your accumulated claude code lore as a deterministic knowledge graph. every session, file, project, tool, and resume edge becomes a node. /lore:graph, /lore:remember, /lore:export.

plugins.name: time
plugins.description: claude's awareness of how alive it is. 5h + 7d + context-window meters with a budgeting rule. /time:left, /time:estimate, /time:handoff.
